items.name_en: 🌷《With Full Original Green Box Packaging》🌷
items.name_cn:
🌷《With Full Original Green Box Packaging》🌷
[New] 👉 GG Marmont Ultra Mini Bag
This GG Marmont ultra mini bag is crafted from quilted V-shaped leather in a refined beige tone, adding a bright new piece to the 2025 Early Spring collection. The item features the series' iconic double G motif, a vintage 1970s symbol that has become a classic element of the brand. Beige quilted V-shaped leather, light gold-tone accessories, cotton-linen blend lining, comes with a keychain that can be connected separately, double G, chain shoulder strap (60cm high), Weight: approx. 0.35kg
Model: 476433.
Size: 16.5(L)x 10(W)x 4.5cm(T)
Color: Beige Full Leather/Original Leather.
Made in Italy
Model Height: 176cm
Fits: iPhone Pro, card holder, and lipstick

items.name_en: 🌷With full original green box packaging🌷GG Marmont Quilted Mini Bag. Gucci's classic small accessories continue to infuse new vitality into the brand's evolving aesthetic. As a highlight of the 2025 Spring/Summer collection, the leather goods collection is presented in a sophisticated taupe, signaling the arrival of a new season. This GG Marmont Mini Bag is presented in a dazzling way, complementing matching accessories in the same tone. Taupe V-shaped Matelassé leather, brass hardware with a burgundy finish, cloud print fabric lining with double-G, sixteen card slots and two bill slots, three separate interior pockets, zip coin pocket, detachable chain shoulder strap (60cm high), snap closure.

items.name_en: Chanel 24C Double Gold Ball AS2649: Went inside to see the seasonal model. The cute SA told me the most popular double gold ball mini is here. Let's do a comparison. Size: Two are almost the same, both are super practical sizes! Can hold a phone, keys, card holder, makeup, etc. Super practical! The double gold ball mini is slightly thicker, but the actual capacity is about the same. Material: Both are cowhide, durable but the hand feel is completely different. The previous cat-eye season model is softer (my favorite texture), more casual and relaxed. I always feel Chanel should be this kind of lazy, casual, exquisite double gold ball. The new one is stiffer, the leather is slightly more shiny, and the side looks more like a Boy bag. Square, because this one is stiffer, so even though it's thicker than the season model, the capacity is actually about the same. I prefer the soft cowhide of the season model for the texture. Chain: The double gold ball chain is slightly thinner, probably for easier pulling. Length is more adjustable! Size: 22×14.5×8cm

items.name_cn:
Chanel 1 🌐 24C Double Small Gold Ball AS2649 ♨️ Exclusive queue entry to see the season's popular mini drawstring bag. I'll write a comparison 🌟 Size: Almost the same, both super practical sizes! Can fit phone, keys, card holder, makeup bag, etc. Super practical! The Double Gold Ball mini is slightly thicker, but the actual capacity is similar.
🌟 Leather: Both are cowhide, durable, but the hand feel is completely different. The previous Cat Eye season version is softer (my favorite texture), more casual. I always feel Chanel should be this kind of lazy, casual, exquisite Double Gold Ball. The new one is stiffer, the leather is slightly more glossy, and the side looks more like a Le Boy. Square shape, because this one is relatively stiff, so even though it's thicker than the season version, the actual capacity is similar.
🌟 Chain: The Double Gold Ball chain is slightly thinner, probably for easier pulling. Length is more adjustable! Size: 22×14.5×8cm

items.name_en: The Oversized Panda🐼 Chanel Classic Flap is stunning. The eye-catching LOGO on the body makes it instantly recognizable as Chanel. ✅ Shoulder ✅ Handheld. It holds everything. The Classic Flap is versatile, understated, timeless, lightweight, and spacious. Perfect for daily commuting. I've tested it for you! A casual Classic Flap tote is practical as a mom bag or for school. Double C LOGO is classic and durable. Very spacious with an effortless, lazy vibe! 🧺 Handbag, pink lining is sweet yet cool. Top-tier value in Chanel vintage. Super spacious and lightweight~

items.name_en: The Oversized Panda🐼 Chanel Classic Flap is stunning. The eye-catching LOGO on the body makes it instantly recognizable as Chanel. ✅ Shoulder ✅ Handheld. It holds everything. The Classic Flap is versatile, understated, timeless, lightweight, and spacious. Perfect for daily commuting. I've tested it for you! A casual Classic Flap tote is practical as a mom bag or for school. Double C LOGO is classic and durable. Very spacious with an effortless, lazy vibe! 🧺 Handbag, pink lining is sweet yet cool. Top-tier value in Chanel vintage. Super spacious and lightweight~
items.name_cn:

Model: AS6337
